title: Fix 5 critical bugs in SenML, RPL DODAG, source routing, LOADng gradients, and LLSec signing
description: Epic to track fixes for project-LICHEN-wimj (SenML RFC8428 multiple values validation), project-LICHEN-s82x (DodagState lowest_rank reset on version/unjoined), project-LICHEN-s4qr (advance_source_route SRH copy instead of mutate), project-LICHEN-yz4p (GradientEntry seq_num freshness check), project-LICHEN-yvk7 (include LLSec byte in signing data). Must use parallel explore subagents, read-before-edit, add only validation/checks/copies/resets/signing, preserve exact style/tests/vectors/output. 3 codereview passes per bug on correctness/security/edge cases. Full test suite + doctor before closing. No test changes, no weakening, no scope creep.
